name: allthebest-appv231
description: Global launcher and installer wrapper for the appv231 Docker sandbox.

scripts.qa:appv231-cli: npm --prefix packages/appv231-cli test && npm --prefix packages/appv231-cli run pack:dry-run
scripts.qa:installer: node --test tests/appv231-sandbox-global.test.js && npm --prefix packages/appv231-cli test && bash -n scripts/install-appv231-sandbox.sh && npm pack --dry-run
